2025-26 Montana Grizzlies Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season

Record: 18-16 (10-8, 4th in Big Sky MBB)

Coach: Travis DeCuire

PS/G: 77.3 (139th of 365)

PA/G: 74.6 (203rd of 365)

SRS: -2.76 (187th of 365)

SOS: -0.89 (155th of 365)

ORtg: 108.6 (204th of 365)

DRtg: 104.8 (119th of 365)
